meta.title: DJR Photography | Who's to Say Foundation
meta.description: DJR Photography highlights creative photography services and behind-the-scenes work from David and the Who's to Say Foundation media team.

hero.title: Stories, portraits, and community moments through David's lens.
hero.subtitle: A creative photography pathway from Who's to Say Foundation, built around real assignments, visible work, and reusable image collections.

sections.title: David behind the lens
sections.body: DJR Photography gives David a real creative identity: camera in hand, assignments to prepare for, and a growing library of images that can be used across pages, stories, and campaigns.

sections.title: David Behind the Lens
sections.body: This section is powered by a reusable CMS album. Editors can update the album once and place it on any DJR page by using its album ID.

items.title: Event coverage
items.body: Community events, sports days, celebrations, and program milestones.

items.title: Portrait moments
items.body: Simple, warm portraits for stories, profiles, cards, and campaigns.

items.title: Image libraries
items.body: Reusable photo collections organized by album, participant, category, tag, and usage notes.

sections.title: Reusable DJR gallery
sections.body: The same album can also render as a responsive grid.

sections.title: Plan a DJR Photography project
sections.body: Reach out to discuss community events, story photography, or a future image collection for your page.
